headline: UPS Expands in Healthcare Logistics With $48 Million Investment
summary: United Parcel Service is investing $48M in 27 temperature-controlled cross-dock facilities as demand rises for cold-chain logistics for sensitive medicines.

raw.headline: UPS Expands in Healthcare Logistics With $48 Million Investment
raw.summary: United Parcel Service is investing $48M in 27 temperature-controlled cross-dock facilities as demand rises for cold-chain logistics for sensitive medicines.

headline: FedEx Earnings Due: A Milestone Report After Massive Transformation
summary: FedEx prepares to release earnings for its fiscal fourth quarter after Tuesday's market close, its first report after executing a momentous structural transformation.  FedEx stock dropped near a buy point, and rival UPS also lost grund.  The restructuring included spinning off FedEx Freight, its less-than-truckload business, earlier this month.

raw.headline: FedEx Earnings Due: A Milestone Report After Massive Transformation
raw.summary: FedEx prepares to release earnings for its fiscal fourth quarter after Tuesday's market close, its first report after executing a momentous structural transformation.  FedEx stock dropped near a buy point, and rival UPS also lost grund.  The restructuring included spinning off FedEx Freight, its less-than-truckload business, earlier this month.

headline: Goldman "broadly" raises estimates for LTL and truckload stocks
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs has raised its earnings estimates and price targets across the less-than-truckload (LTL) and truckload transportation sectors, citing improving freight fundamentals and the potential for a stronger-than-expected recovery.

raw.headline: Goldman "broadly" raises estimates for LTL and truckload stocks
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs has raised its earnings estimates and price targets across the less-than-truckload (LTL) and truckload transportation sectors, citing improving freight fundamentals and the potential for a stronger-than-expected recovery.

headline: Pak Mail in Garland, Texas Welcomes New Owner--Former Customer Transitions from Industrial Technology Career
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in Garland, TX to new owner, David Somiari. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail location of nearly 30 years.

raw.headline: Pak Mail in Garland, Texas Welcomes New Owner--Former Customer Transitions from Industrial Technology Career

This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail location of nearly 30 years.

headline: New Ownership of AIM Mail Center in Huntington Beach, California Marks New Chapter for Longstanding Business, Led by Former Housing and Urban Development Professional
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing AIM Mail Center location in Huntington Beach, CA. With a background in real estate and Housing and Urban Development, the new owner brings a service-driven perspective that ensures the community will continue to benefit from the essential offerings of this nearly 30-year AIM Mail Center. The owner currently works as a Notary
